feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to hide "Totals" for specific measure
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I want to display Totals only for the "Gross Carrying Amount" measure and hide the Totals for the "Carrying Amount" measure. How can I hide the Totals column for just this specific measure (i.e., the last column), while keeping the Totals for the first column visible?

I've looked through the Table options, but I don't see any setting to selectively hide Totals.

Thanks,

Mayura

entry.title: Selecting Max age in a table for each unique flocks in my table
entry.content:
Hii Community,

I have a requirement where I need to show the following in my table: -

1.when i open my dashboard i want to see the max ages of each flocks till last week and also show those flocks max ages which are finished. Each with a single record 

2.if i select some other age apart from max age from Input Control Dropdown i need to see all flocks' data for selected age 

3. if i select a flock from filter input control i want to see the max age details for that flock only 

Tell me if this is possible to achieve and how ??

entry.title: No data is available for the chart to render. SAC
entry.content:
I am trying to display two key figures in SAC, but they are not showing any data. These key figures were displayed a few days ago.

What can I do to fix this error message? 

I am using a live BW connection.

entry.title: SAC Rolling Forecast Multi Selection issue
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

Created Story with Rolling Forecast  In INPUT Filter iam unable to select multi inputs (Actual, Budget)

Followed below steps to  Forecast layout as per below image 

 

 

 

 

 

Kindly Suggest on  Multiple  select

entry.title: Extract the list of calculated measures inside stories
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I was wondering if you know if it is possible to extract the list of all calculated measures inside the stories.

I have access to system administration and system administration data model, but I can not manage to find if this is possible or not.

Any answer or pist of solution would be appreciated, thank you

entry.title: SAC outer join of two models
entry.content:
Hi all,

There is a need to compare data of two models (both with measure and w/o account). As result only those records of model A should be shown that do not match model B. How it can be developed?

P.S. I have found options that might help, but I cannot find them in the system:

‘All primary data’ – similar to left outer join

‘All data’ – similar to full outer join

‘Intersecting data only’ – similar to inner join

Best regards,

Oleksandr

entry.title: Automating Comment Backup and Retrieval in SAC – Guidance Needed
entry.content:
Hi Community,
I’m looking for guidance on how to automate the backup and retrieval of comments entered in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)—whether through the comment widget or directly within a story (e.g., charts, tables, or input controls).
Specifically, I’d like to know:

  • Can data actions be written to automate the backup of comments to a separate model or table?
  • If comments are backed up, is it possible to retrieve deleted comments through scripting or data actions?
  • Is there a standard method to export or archive comments in SAC?
  • Are comments stored in a backend model that can be accessed or backed up directly?
  • What are the best practices for maintaining a history of comments for audit, compliance, or collaboration purposes?


Our objective is to build a reliable, automated solution for safeguarding comment data, particularly in planning & reporting scenarios where version control and traceability are critical.
Any insights, examples, or recommendations from your experience would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance,

entry.title: SAC: Data Action to Enrich Information
entry.content:
Hi experts
Is it possible to copy certain data in specific rows using a DataAction? For example adding the cost center and company for each employee and period.

Any assistance would be highly appreciated.

Many Thanks,

Ioana

entry.title: What is the major difference between SAP BO Webi and SAP Analytic cloud functionality
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I would like to know what is major difference is between SAP BO  Webi and SAP Analytics Cloud

1) Does SAP SAC support creating a complex summary report similar to Webi, where vertical cross tab and horizontal table etc.

2)SAP SAC supports functionality like hierarchy data  when we use source system BW/HANA queries example, in the Webi query level, when including hierarchy levels 1 and 4 for the dimension for the attribute hierarchies 

Country Hireach level
India level-1 
Austraila Level -2
Sri lankaLevel -3
German Level -4
  
SAP  SAC  supports this kind of attribute hierarchy 
Country  
Hierarchy level-1India 
Hierarchy level-4 German
  
SAP SAC presentation output
Country hierarchy  
India  
Genman

entry.title: SAC "Only data of the table that are on the current page will be exported to an Excel file." Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

i'm getting this warning message when trying to run an Excel export on all the tables in my story.

"Only data of the table that are on the current page will be exported to an Excel file."

tables are nested in tab strips in different pages.

 

i'm using in with a button in on click event : 

Exporter_Excel.exportReport();

entry.title: How to include Segment in an organisation-type public dimension hierarchy in SAC with standard API?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working on building a public dimension of type Organisation in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to represent an organisational hierarchy.
The hierarchy should reflect the following structure:

Segment → Profit Center Groups → Profit Centers → Cost Centers

So far, I have been using standard SAP APIs to bring the data for Profit Centers and Cost Centers successfully. However, I am facing challenges including the Segment level in the hierarchy.

The Segment field exists in the query behind Profit Centers, but it does not appear or cannot be linked correctly in the public dimension.

My setup uses an import connection to SAC, and the public dimension is based on these standard APIs.

My questions are:

  1. Is it possible to include Segment as a level above Profit Center Groups in a public dimension of type Organisation in SAC?
  2. If yes, how can I properly configure the hierarchy to include Segment?
  3. Are there any recommended SAP APIs or CDS views that support this Segment → Profit Center Groups → Profit Centers → Cost Centers hierarchy out of the box?
  4. If this is not possible directly, what would be the best practice to model this hierarchy with Segment included? Should I create a custom model or custom hierarchy in SAC?

Any guidance, example configurations, or pointers to SAP documentation would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your support.

#SAPAnalyticsCloud #PublicDimension #OrganisationHierarchy #Segment #ProfitCenter #CostCenter #SAPAPIs

entry.title: my data action has no error , but it is not working ,
entry.content:
I want to update my buying price column or br product with 100 but  data action is not working


CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/Br_profit_center], [d/BR_Product], [d/BR_COMPONENT]
CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = CALENDARYEAR
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON
CONFIG.FLIPPING_SIGN_ACCORDING_ACCTYPE = OFF
MEMBERSET [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center], %profit_center%)  //MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %BUDGET_YR% TO NEXT(11, "MONTH", %BUDGET_YR%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/start_date] TO [d/Version].[p/end_date]
MEMBERSET [d/gl_account1] = ("CIF LKR", "CIF_LKR")
MEMBERSET [d/BR_brand] = "#"
//MEMBERSET [d/BR_COMPONENT] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_OFFICE] = "#"
 
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_customer] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_Dist_Channel] = "#"
//MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET[d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD"
 
 
 
IF [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center].[h/heirarchy], "0PHAH") THEN
//IF [d/BR_Product].[p/] = "Imported Product" THEN
        DELETE()
 
DATA([d/gl_account1] = "Buying Price", [d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD" ) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] = "FOB" ) * ( 1 + (RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] = "INSURANCE %")/100) + (RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account1] ="FREIGHT")/100))
 
 
DATA([d/BR_Product] = "3000000368") = 1000
 
ENDIF

i tried this one also 
CONFIG.HIERARCHY.INCLUDE_MEMBERS_NOT_IN_HIERARCHY = [d/Br_profit_center], [d/BR_Product]
CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = CALENDARYEAR
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON
CONFIG.FLIPPING_SIGN_ACCORDING_ACCTYPE = OFF
MEMBERSET [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center], "0PHAH")   //MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %BUDGET_YR% TO NEXT(11, "MONTH", %BUDGET_YR%)
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/start_date] TO [d/Version].[p/end_date]
MEMBERSET [d/gl_account1] = ("CIF LKR", "CIF_LKR")
MEMBERSET [d/BR_brand] = "#" //MEMBERSET [d/BR_COMPONENT] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_OFFICE] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_customer] = "#"
MEMBERSET [d/BR_Dist_Channel] = "#" //MEMBERSET [d/BR_SALES_ORG] = "#"
MEMBERSET[d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD"
//MEMBERSET[d/BR_COMPONENT] = "#"
 
 
 
IF [d/Br_profit_center] = BASEMEMBER([d/Br_profit_center].[h/heirarchy], "0PHAH") THEN
 
IF [d/BR_Product].[p/import_mnfr] = "Imported Product" THEN
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
DELETE()
 
 
 
/
 
DATA([d/gl_account1] = "Buying Price", [d/BR_CIF] = "CIF-USD" ) = 100
 
 
 
//DATA([d/gl_account1] = "Buying Price",[d/BR_Product] = "3000000368") = 1000*1
ENDIF
ENDIF

entry.title: It is possible to uncheck by default show groups feature in Data Analyzer?
entry.content:
Hello,

Whenever I will open Data Analyzer from script NavigationUtils.openDataAnalyzer(...); by default dimensions are grouped in the list. It is possible to have that by default unchecked? Without need to uncheck that manually and have flat presentation.

entry.title: Datasphere & SAC Users and Activities Source Tables
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to create usage reports (Activities related to which views from Datasphere are accessed by SAC and the user that viewed the story in SAC and last login date for individual users for both Datasphere and SAC) based on the Users and Activities tables found in Datasphere and SAC under the Security Tab.

 

I would like to avoid having to download the CSVs from the User and Activities tabs completely and rather use the underlying tables where this data is stored directly.

Where can I find the source tables? Using the Database Explorer on Datasphere I have looked under the SYS and DWC_Global schemas so far with no luck.

entry.title: How to Add Calculated Measures from Two Different Models in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m working on a SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Story, and I have the following requirement:

I have two calculated measures, each coming from a different analytical model (1  From Datasphere and other third Party Tools), and I’d like to create a new calculated measure by adding them together to use in a chart or KPI in the story.

Example:

  • From Model A, I have a calculated measure: Online Sales Revenue

  • From Model B, I have another calculated measure: Retail Store Sales Revenue

I want to create a new measure like:

Total Sales Revenue = Online Sales Revenue + Retail Store Sales Revenue

and use this total in a Combined KPI tile or chart within the same story.

How can we  Achieve this in SAC Story .

entry.title: Hardcoding users in transformation logic of IPS to provide access for SAC Reporting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to hardcode users in IPS to grant access to Story Reports. Earlier, we were using the sf.user.filter in the properties and added the respective usernames there. But there are more than 100 users now to be hardcoded and we cannot continue to add in this filter because of the character limit.

Can anybody give an idea if this hardcoding for providing access to SAC reporting can be done via transformation logic of source/target system?

What code can be added to hardcode such users?

Thanks in advance for your response.

entry.title: SAC embed mode not working on mobile devices
entry.content:
Hi all,

We tried to integrate sac content (stories etc) via iframe in our Fiori System. It works in the browsers on laptops but not on mobile devices. The issue: because the fiori url is different from the iframe url (sapanalyticscloud….) . Because of this the Story will not open on iOS devices (for example).I figured That this is because of the Setting „Prevent Cross Site Tracking“. I think this is also because we have idp in between and using saml for auth. Anyone having the same issue? Unfortunately sap do not offering proxy urls so you could have sac in your own url area.

Ideally we would like to keep fiori as our single point of entry for our users…

entry.title: SAP BDC Demo Environment
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Since the BDC trial version is now available, I’d like to create a demo using it. Could you please guide me on how to enable or build the content? Also, is it possible to showcase a demo using standard content, considering that the source systems are not properly maintained? I’m looking for any way to effectively pitch it to clients. I’m exploring options to work exclusively within BDC AI/ML part. The practice source systems are not properly maintained, making it impractical to establish connections with them. However, intelligent applications or insight apps require both source and target systems to be connected in order to enable the content. Are there any materials or documents available that can guide the implementation of Databricks AI/ML on raw data within an SAP BDC environment?

entry.title: SAC Error During Package Export
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm encountering an issue while exporting a package in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). The error message I receive is:

Object 'ModelName' failed to export: mPlanId2QueryId[sId] is not iterable (cannot read property undefined)

Has anyone experienced this before or knows what might be causing it?
From what I understand, it seems related to a missing or undefined mapping between plan IDs and query IDs, but the model appears to be correctly configured, and I haven’t made recent changes.
Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance,
Flavia

entry.title: SAC - Difference between formulas using RESTRICT, LOOKUP, RESULTLOOKUP?
entry.content:
Hello folks:

Please, can someone explain the differences, best with a vivid example, beetnw the formulas

RESTRICTED, LOOKUP, RESULTLOOKUP

when defining a calculated measure in an SAC model?

 

Thanks in advance,
Andreas J.A.
